name: suggestions
title: Suggestions
description: Prompt-suggestion chip row for empty chats and follow-ups.

files.content:
# Suggestions

Prompt-suggestion chip row for empty chats and follow-ups.

`<Suggestions items={[{ icon: 'sparkles', label: 'Summarize this thread' }, 'Draft a reply']} onPick={send} />`

3–5 chips max, verb-first labels. Picking a chip should send it, not just fill the composer.
